layout_strategies.container: max-w-md mx-auto md:max-w-5xl md:mx-auto px-4 md:px-8

buttons.primary: bg-[#E23744] hover:bg-[#C42B37] text-white rounded-full font-medium h-12 px-6 shadow-md active:scale-95 transition-transform
buttons.secondary: bg-white border border-zinc-200 text-zinc-900 hover:bg-zinc-50 rounded-full font-medium h-12 px-6
buttons.ghost: text-zinc-600 hover:bg-zinc-100 hover:text-zinc-900 rounded-lg h-10 px-4

cards.base: bg-white rounded-2xl border border-zinc-100 shadow-sm p-5
cards.interactive: bg-white rounded-2xl border border-zinc-100 shadow-sm p-5 hover:shadow-md transition-shadow cursor-pointer

inputs.base: h-12 rounded-xl border-zinc-200 focus:ring-[#E23744] focus:border-[#E23744] bg-zinc-50/50

accessibility_rules.contrast: Ensure text on red background is pure white. Text on gray background must be zinc-600 or darker.

universal_guidelines: Do not use 'Inter' font. Use 'DM Sans' exclusively.
Avoid gradients. Use solid, high-contrast colors.
Mobile navigation must be at the bottom for Staff role.
Owner dashboard should use a dense grid layout (Bento grid).
All interactive elements must have 'data-testid' attributes.
instructions_to_main_agent: You are building Zomoto Tasks. Focus on the mobile experience first. The app should feel snappy and native-like. Use the provided image URLs for the login screen and empty states. Strictly follow the Red (#E23744) and White theme. Do not deviate from the DM Sans font requirement.
